scripts.install-subpkgs: cd src/helm-types && bun install --frozen-lockfile && cd ../cdk8s && bun install --frozen-lockfile
scripts.build: bun run install-subpkgs && cd src/cdk8s && bun run build
scripts.test: bun run install-subpkgs && cd src/cdk8s && bun run test && cd ../helm-types && bun run test
scripts.lint: bun run install-subpkgs && cd src/cdk8s && bun run lint && cd ../helm-types && bun run lint
scripts.typecheck: bun run install-subpkgs && cd src/cdk8s && bun run typecheck && cd ../helm-types && bun run typecheck
